questions.q: Hydrogen bonding is strongest in which of the following?
Which of the following substances would be expected to have the highest boiling point?
The relatively high boiling point of water compared to hydrogen sulfide is due to __________.
In a diamond, each carbon atom is bonded to four other carbon atoms in a __________.
Which of the following is true about ionic solids?
options: They conduct electricity in the solid state
They are usually soluble in nonpolar solvents
They conduct electricity when melted or dissolved in water
They are held together by covalent bonds
questions.answer: They conduct electricity when melted or dissolved in water

questions.q: The vapor pressure of a liquid increases with __________.
Which of the following is the most polar compound?
The density of ice is less than that of liquid water because __________.
options: ice is less dense than water
hydrogen bonding in ice creates a crystalline structure with more space
questions.answer: hydrogen bonding in ice creates a crystalline structure with more space
